purpose: Run a recurring pre-implementation lint over the ambition graph so weak, stale, or malformed beads become actionable findings without hiding unrelated claimable work.

source_of_truth_policy.failure_classification: Tool timeouts and br/bv disagreement are tracker failures; invalid labels and dependency cycles are graph failures; weak tests, logs, and artifacts are code/evidence readiness findings.
source_of_truth_policy.implementation_rule: Findings must name a next_safe_action and must not auto-delete, auto-close, or narrow any bead.

rule_catalog.expected: Every label matches ^[A-Za-z0-9_:-]+$ so br --no-db can parse the graph.
Open tasks carry bead-specific acceptance criteria with tests, e2e or harness coverage, logs, artifacts, closure commands, and no-feature-loss language.
Dependencies reference existing beads, avoid self edges, and contain no blocker cycles.
br and bv probe failures are recorded as tracker failures with exact command evidence.
Open beads that claim shipped evidence must name the remaining blocker or be reconciled with current proof.
Open implementation beads name a concrete work surface and user-visible or conformance impact.

tracker_probes.name: bv_robot_triage
tracker_probes.actual: reported zero actionable despite open fixture work

issues.title: EPIC: Fixture parent for graph readiness lint
issues.description: Parent fixture that keeps graph-readiness examples grouped.
issues.acceptance_criteria: Preserve every fixture issue and dependency intention. Closure must list exact commands, artifact paths, structured logs, and remaining limitations.

issues.title: Add fixture-backed readiness lint report
issues.description: Implement a deterministic graph-quality report that protects conformance and user-visible claim surfaces before implementation waves.
issues.acceptance_criteria: Preserve all existing graph ambition; include unit tests, deterministic e2e harness replay, structured JSONL logs with trace_id and failure_signature, artifact freshness checks, closure commands, and explicit limitations.

issues.title: Closed bead with invalid label syntax
issues.description: Old closed tracker row that should still remain parseable by no-db tooling.

issues.title: Cycle fixture A
issues.description: Dependency cycle fixture that should be classified as a graph failure.
issues.acceptance_criteria: Preserve the cycle example; include unit tests, deterministic e2e replay, structured logs, artifact paths, closure commands, and known limitation notes.

issues.title: Cycle fixture B
issues.description: Dependency cycle fixture that should be classified as a graph failure.
issues.acceptance_criteria: Preserve the cycle example; include unit tests, deterministic e2e replay, structured logs, artifact paths, closure commands, and known limitation notes.

issues.title: Open bead that says shipped
issues.description: Harness shipped in commit deadbeef but the row is still open and has no reconciliation note.
issues.acceptance_criteria: Preserve status evidence; include unit tests, e2e replay, structured JSONL logs, artifact refs, closure commands, and limitations before closing.
